items.raw_desc: Hordozható kávéfőző Wacaco Nanopresso Arctic Blue tokkal:        The Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine allows you to prepare delicious fresh coffee at the campsite, on a trip, holiday or on a hiking tour. It does not need any source of energy for its operation, it is enough to pour hot water into it, which you can also store in a thermos, add coffee and then prepare coffee with a few presses of the piston. Nanopresso can reach a pressure of up to 18 bar and works ideally with finely ground coffee. It excels in its very low weight, so it is easy to carry and can hold up to 80 ml of water. The coffee machine includes a removable cup and both parts have a heat sink that absorbs heat and protects the hands. In addition, its maintenance takes only a few seconds and the package also includes a high-quality hard case. With the Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine, you can enjoy fresh coffee anywhere. items.raw_desc: Mikrofon Elgato Wave Neo:Elgato Wave Neo microphone thanks to its perfect pitch, it captures your voice with the clarity of a premium microphone. The Wave Neo's attached riser places it at the ideal distance from your mouth - so listeners hear more of your voice and less of the clicking of keys. Setup is possible in seconds, just connect to your computer and select the microphone - it's ready to use right out of the box, no additional equipment or software required.  Unlike the built-in microphones in a laptop, Wave Neo reproduces your voice with realistic accuracy. The sound is so clear that listeners feel like they're right there with you, turning a virtual conversation into a real connection. Wherever you talk, Wave Neo fits perfectly from your home laptop to your office Mac, iPad, iPhone and even PlayStation. A Lightning-to-USB adapter may be required for iPhone. The microphone won the VGP Award, a recognition from industry experts and consumers for exceptional performance, design and innovation in the audio-visual industry.

items.raw_desc: Babahordozó Ergobaby Embrace Soft Air Mesh Soft Grey:The ERGOBABY Embrace Soft Air Mesh carrier is designed with the needs of babies in the first months of life in mind, offering gentle support for the body and head without the need for complicated fastening. Thanks to the soft, stretchy and breathable jersey-like fabric, it provides the newborn with a cosy feeling of close proximity that mimics the contact of pregnancy. For parents, the supportive waist belt and elasticated crossover straps make it surprisingly comfortable to wear, even for extended periods at home or on walks. In addition, the ERGOBABY Embrace Soft Air Mesh is very light and compact.
